title: franca mollis
intro: Franca mollis, also known as the soft tree fern or native tree fern, is a plant species native to Australia and parts of Asia, characterized by its soft and feathery fronds. The medicinal properties of Franca mollis include its ability to reduce inflammation and relieve respiratory issues due to its expectorant properties. The plant is known for its various health benefits, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help protect against cell damage and support overall well-being. Franca mollis can be prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, with some cultures using it as a traditional remedy for respiratory issues and skin conditions.
